data.description:
## Context
The plan-review gate (`5fd2`) deliberately EXEMPTS bugs in v1 — a bug has a different shape (reproduction,
expected-vs-actual, fix-plan) than a feature plan, and round-4 data showed the plan criteria draw mostly
planning-noise on bugs. This epic designs the dedicated bug-review gate. (Spun out of `5fd2`; was follow-on F6.)

## Success Criteria
- A review gate tuned to bug tickets (reproduction adequacy, root-cause vs symptom, fix-plan soundness,
  regression-test presence), reusing the three-pass structure and the shared infrastructure.
- Bugs are no longer simply skipped: they get an appropriate, low-false-positive review.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] A bug-specific criteria set (reproduction, expected-vs-actual, root-cause, regression test) on the three-pass structure.
- [ ] Validated on real bug tickets across the corpuses; low false-positive vs the plan criteria on bugs.
- [ ] Reuses the shared review infrastructure (engine, Pass-2/Pass-3, eval seam).
data.title: Bug-ticket review gate (dedicated; the plan-review gate exempts bugs in v1)
